title: Senior Teacher - IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd:
IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Ahmedabad Consulting Pvt Ltd!
